module_mood_contract: learning through contrast — 'I can feel what packaging adds now; I couldn't have read it as a lecture'

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Split mega-exercise when phases are distinct skills.
rules_evaluated.evidence: Four phases each producing distinct artefact (diagnosis -> validations -> verifier -> reference+plan); chained but each a different skill. Strategy doc explicitly designs this as four-phase exercise.
Six registry-expanded prompts (markers diagnose-and-resend-1..6). Each phase's mechanic encoded in its prompt.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Verification machinery needs smoke-test before trust.
rules_evaluated.evidence: Phase 3 prompt 5 is explicitly the smoke-test ('verify the verifier fires'). Body line 73-74: 'Built-but-untested = not built.'
Body line 5: 'Open a new Claude Code session in the M5 worktree at ../<repo>-m5'. /rename m5-diagnose-resend in .session-block at line 8.
Line 3: '**Session** *(new, "Module 5 worktree session")*' canonical shape. Inner pre with /rename slug.
All four teaching beats mood 8; close mood 9 (the contrast moment).

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Strategy-fidelity — three-pattern earns name at closer, not here.
rules_evaluated.evidence: Maintainer block line 132 explicitly: 'Three-pattern naming pre-empted — if Phase 2 or Phase 3 names "Ronacher's three-pattern," the closing lecture has nothing to add.' Body never names Ronacher.
Six markers each with one-sentence action lead-ins.
Verbs: read, walk, build, push back, smoke-test, assemble. No defend/justify shapes.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Mood lands 8+ at every teaching beat.

rules_evaluated.evidence: Re-send is module-Debrief territory, not exercise scope. Closing lecture (module-level) earns three-pattern.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Teaching moment — three failure modes from own artefact.
rules_evaluated.evidence: Body line 15-16: 'Ronacher's three-pattern earns its name in this exercise. You don't learn it from a slide; you build each piece against a failure you read in your own artefact.'

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Big Idea fidelity to strategy M5 main exercise.
rules_evaluated.evidence: Strategy doc M5 names exactly four phases (read return / align-then-run-reverse / build verifier / assemble reference+plan.md). File honours all four.
